item.title: Katherine Bauer: Transmissions In Silver
item.description:
Saturday, October 19, 2024 at 12 PM

Location: 5601A Navigation Blvd, Houston, TX 77011

Aurora and Arts & Culture Lab present a free cinema performance by artist Katherine Bauer involving multiple 16mm film projections and live photographic exposures.

From Aurora Picture Show

Event details

item.title: Nazli Dinçel: Tender Disruptions
item.description:
Monday, November 4, 2024 at 12 PM

Location: 5601A Navigation Blvd, Houston, TX 77011

Aurora and Big Queer Picture Show co-present a program of artist Nazli Dinçel’s 16mm experimental films exploring desire and dislocation.

From Aurora Picture Show

Event details

item.title: The Idea Fund 2025 Presentations & Reception
item.description:
Tuesday, February 11, 2025 at 12 PM

Location: 5601A Navigation Blvd, Houston, TX 77011

The Idea Fund grants support projects by Houston area artists and groups. Join us at the historic Eldorado Ballroom for this free event celebrating the latest round of awardees and featuring artist presentations and a reception.

From Aurora Picture Show

Event details

item.title: NIGHT LIGHT 2025
item.description:
Saturday, March 29, 2025 at 12 PM

Location: 5601A Navigation Blvd, Houston, TX 77011

Aurora and Buffalo Bayou Partnership co-present this free annual outdoor event featuring artists’ video activations on structures along the Buffalo Bayou East waterfront and a market.

From Aurora Picture Show

Event details

item.title: BYOB (Bring Your Own Beamer)
item.description:
Saturday, April 26, 2025 at 12 PM

Location: 5601A Navigation Blvd, Houston, TX 77011

Aurora and The Menil Collection co-present this lively, annual evening of community-sourced projections covering the museum’s façade. Those who want to participate can sign up in advance. Attendees are encouraged to bring their own blankets, chairs, snacks, and beverages.

From Aurora Picture Show

Event details

item.title: Aurora Grand Opening Party!
item.description:
Thursday, May 22, 2025 at 12 PM

Location: 5601A Navigation Blvd, Houston, TX 77011

All are invited to join us in celebrating the opening of Aurora Picture Show’s new space with beverages, light bites, video projections, and DJs Gracie Chavez and Flash Gordon Parks.

From Aurora Picture Show

Event details

item.title: Extremely Shorts Film Festival 2025
item.description:
Friday, May 30, 2025 at 8:30 PM

Location: 5601A Navigation Blvd, Houston, TX 77011

Aurora’s annual showcase of contemporary short films (3 minutes or shorter), the 28th annual Extremely Shorts will screen May 30-31, with some participating filmmakers in attendance and receptions featuring Ice House Radio DJ’s. The festival program will be streaming here June 1-6 for global audiences.

From Aurora Picture Show

Event details

item.title: Constant Companions
item.description:
Saturday, June 7, 2025 at 12 PM

Location: 5601A Navigation Blvd, Houston, TX 77011

Aurora and the Menil Collection co-present a free program of short films exploring the ever-evolving role animals play in culture and daily life. Held inside the Menil Collection’s main building.

From Aurora Picture Show

Event details

item.title: Memory Hole: Animals are Over
item.description:
Sunday, June 29, 2025 at 12 PM

Location: 5601A Navigation Blvd, Houston, TX 77011

Memory Hole, the enigmatic spinoff of Everything is Terrible!, presents this surreal, anti-civilization composed entirely of found home video footage interwoven with a live performance/score.

From Aurora Picture Show

Event details

item.title: Oksana Kazmina: Contemporary History of Ukraine
item.description:
Saturday, July 19, 2025 at 12 PM

Location: 5601A Navigation Blvd, Houston, TX 77011

Aurora and Basket Books & Art co-present an interactive performance-lecture by Ukrainian artist Oksana Kazmina. Kazmina presents a mosaic of her personal archives, offering a layered perspective on war, history, culture, and the relationship between the body and territory.

From Aurora Picture Show

Event details

item.title: Violette Bule: Geometric Failure
item.description:
Thursday, August 14, 2025 at 12 PM

Location: 5601A Navigation Blvd, Houston, TX 77011

Aurora hosts a pop-up installation by Houston-based artist Violette Bule–an emotional, sensory experience exploring the ongoing crises and social upheaval in Venezuela.

From Aurora Picture Show

Event details

item.title: Summer Filmmaking Camp Premiere
item.description:
Saturday, August 16, 2025 at 12 PM

Location: 5601A Navigation Blvd, Houston, TX 77011

Aurora and the Museum of Fine Arts Houston co-present the world premiere screening of short films made by participants (ages 7-13) in Aurora’s Summer Youth Filmmaking Camps 2025!

From Aurora Picture Show

Event details

item.title: Miguel Calderón: Spitting Upwards
item.description:
Friday, September 12, 2025 at 8 PM

Location: 5601A Navigation Blvd, Houston, TX 77011

Aurora presents two programs of experimental films, music videos, and genre-bending documentaries by Mexican multidisciplinary artist, Miguel Calderón, with Calderón’s in attendance.

From Aurora Picture Show

Event details

item.title: Leila and the Wolves
item.description:
Sunday, September 28, 2025 at 12 PM

Location: 5601A Navigation Blvd, Houston, TX 77011

Aurora and HTX MADE co-present a special screening of this rarely seen 1984 film by Lebanese filmmaker Heiny Srour exploring the collective memory of women in Palestine and Lebanon and their hidden roles in historical events.

From Aurora Picture Show

Event details

item.title: Sindhu Thirumalaisamy: Concrete Stories
item.description:
Saturday, October 11, 2025 at 12 PM

Location: 5601A Navigation Blvd, Houston, TX 77011

Houston-based artist Sindhu Thirumalaisamy’s immersive program responds to hyper-development in wetland regions of both the U.S. Gulf Coast and Southern India.

From Aurora Picture Show

Event details

item.title: He Never Dies: Films of Kalil Haddad
item.description:
Saturday, October 25, 2025 at 12 PM

Location: 5601A Navigation Blvd, Houston, TX 77011

Aurora and Big Queer Picture Show co-present films by queer Palestinian-Canadian filmmaker Kalil Haddad. Intended for mature audiences. 18+ only.

From Aurora Picture Show

Event details

item.title: (Re)covering in Movement
item.description:
Saturday, November 8, 2025 at 12 PM

Location: 5601A Navigation Blvd, Houston, TX 77011

Aurora and Houston Cinema Arts Festival co-present a free program of experimental shorts from Ethiopia’s Addis Video Art Festival.

From Aurora Picture Show

Event details

item.title: Member Moviola: Speed Street
item.description:
Tuesday, November 18, 2025 at 12 PM

Location: 5601A Navigation Blvd, Houston, TX 77011

Aurora’s members-only gathering is back! Join us for beverages, snacks, and a special 40th anniversary screening of the fast-moving 1985 short film Speed Street capturing Houston art-punk roller-skating gang the Urban Animals.

From Aurora Picture Show

Event details

item.title: Dario Robleto: Ancient Beacons Long For Notice
item.description:
Friday, December 5, 2025 at 12 PM

Location: 5601A Navigation Blvd, Houston, TX 77011

Aurora Picture Show, the Museum of Fine Arts, Houston, and Art League Houston co-present Houston artist Dario Robleto’s film Ancient Beacons Long for Notice, the latest in his series exploring the Golden Record.

From Aurora Picture Show

Event details

item.title: Aurora Holiday Party & Raffle
item.description:
Thursday, December 18, 2025 at 12 PM

Location: 5601A Navigation Blvd, Houston, TX 77011

Join us for Aurora’s famously festive annual holiday party! This free gathering features beverages, light bites, vinyl DJs, vintage holiday TV projections, and of course, our raffle with goodies galore!

From Aurora Picture Show

Event details

item.title: Aurora Thrift Shop!
item.description:
Saturday, January 17, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: 5601A Navigation Blvd, Houston, TX 77011

Aurora Picture Show's one-day pop-up thrift sale features a variety of physical media, collectibles, clothes, and marvelous miscellany! Funky finds and friendly folks. Drop by!

From Aurora Picture Show

Event details

item.title: Jim Henson: Early Experiments
item.description:
Thursday, January 22, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: 5601A Navigation Blvd, Houston, TX 77011

A special screening of rarely seen, experimental film and television projects created by Jim Henson in the 1960s, before the ubiquity of his beloved Muppets and movies! Presented in association with the Jim Henson Legacy.

From Aurora Picture Show

Event details

item.title: Houstonic Flow
item.description:
Saturday, February 7, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: 5601A Navigation Blvd, Houston, TX 77011

Aurora and the East End Cultural District present a unique, free-admission media art event featuring the premieres of new videos and installations by six Houston artists and Ice House Radio DJs.

From Aurora Picture Show

Event details

item.title: Navigating The Archives Within
item.description:
Thursday, February 19, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: 5601A Navigation Blvd, Houston, TX 77011

Aurora, Blaffer, and Lawndale co-present this experimental live performance and media work by Francis and Anthony Almendárez incorporating archival and original imagery, readings, and improvised music.

From Aurora Picture Show

Event details

item.title: The Idea Fund Presentations & Reception
item.description:
Tuesday, March 3, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: 5601A Navigation Blvd, Houston, TX 77011

Join us for this free event to meet the artists who have received this year’s The Idea Fund grants and hear about their exciting, upcoming projects! There will be short project presentations by 2026 grant recipients followed by a reception.

From Aurora Picture Show

Event details

item.title: NIGHT LIGHT 2026
item.description:
Saturday, March 28, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: 5601A Navigation Blvd, Houston, TX 77011

Aurora Picture Show and Buffalo Bayou Partnership co-present this free, annual outdoor event featuring site-specific video art works along Buffalo Bayou–held this year in Downtown Houston near historic Allen’s Landing. Installations by Houston artists Hillerbrand + Magasamen, Corey De’Juan Sherrard Jr., and Kenneth Tam, plus a market and DJ Gracie Chavez!

From Aurora Picture Show

Event details

item.title: Member Moviola
item.description:
Thursday, April 9, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: 5601A Navigation Blvd, Houston, TX 77011

Join us for Aurora’s upcoming member gathering to mingle over beverages and bites and catch up on our upcoming programs. We’ll also be celebrating the 40th anniversary of the legendary 1986 downtown audiovisual spectacle Rendezvous Houston with a special viewing of documentary footage of the event.

From Aurora Picture Show

Event details

item.title: BYOB (Bring Your Own Beamer)
item.description:
Saturday, May 2, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: 5601A Navigation Blvd, Houston, TX 77011

Aurora and The Menil Collection co-present our lively annual evening of community-sourced projections covering the museum’s façade. This free outdoor event has become a Houston tradition for creative participants and picnicking audiences alike for more than a decade.

From Aurora Picture Show

Event details

item.title: The Films of Roy Fridge
item.description:
Saturday, May 16, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: 5601A Navigation Blvd, Houston, TX 77011

A program of rarely-seen experimental films made by Texas artist Roy Fridge between the late-1950s and early-1970s, introduced by his friend and gallerist Betty Moody. The program also includes a number of his early animated television commercials.

From Aurora Picture Show

Event details

item.title: Extremely Shorts Film Festival 2026
item.description:
Friday, May 29, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: 5601A Navigation Blvd, Houston, TX 77011

Aurora’s 29th annual Extremely Shorts Film Festival features 34 short films from 10 countries. Guest juror Adam Sekuler and some participating filmmakers will be in attendance, and post-screening receptions feature music provided by Ice House Radio.

From Aurora Picture Show

Event details

item.title: Open Mic Comedy
item.description:
Thursday, June 18, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: The Mood Room Garden and Bar, 711 Milby Street, Houston, TX, 77023

Get ready for The Mood Room's Open Mic Comedy Night, happening every Thursday, hosted by comedian Blake Jones and sponsored by HoneySuckle Brand!

From The Mood Room

Event details

item.title: Closed for Private Party
item.description:
Saturday, June 20, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: The Mood Room Garden and Bar, 711 Milby Street, Houston, TX, 77023

From The Mood Room

Event details

item.title: Industry Night
item.description:
Tuesday, June 23, 2026 at 9 PM

Location: The Mood Room Garden and Bar, 711 Milby Street, Houston, TX, 77023

Calling all restaurant & bar staff — 50% off all night just for you!Come through every Tuesday, 9 PM–2 AM, grab a drink, and vibe with the industry fam. You’ve earned it.

From The Mood Room

Event details

item.title: Game Night Wednesdays
item.description:
Wednesday, June 24, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: The Mood Room Garden and Bar, 711 Milby Street, Houston, TX, 77023

Game on, good times guaranteed. Every Wednesday.

From The Mood Room

Event details

item.title: Open Mic Comedy
item.description:
Thursday, June 25, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: The Mood Room Garden and Bar, 711 Milby Street, Houston, TX, 77023

Get ready for The Mood Room's Open Mic Comedy Night, happening every Thursday, hosted by comedian Blake Jones and sponsored by HoneySuckle Brand!

From The Mood Room

Event details

item.title: Vinyl Friday
item.description:
Friday, June 26, 2026 at 9 PM

Location: The Mood Room Garden and Bar, 711 Milby Street, Houston, TX, 77023

All vinyl throwback event! Join us for FREE on the 4th Friday of every month with special guests DJs all night from Jamz713.

From The Mood Room

Event details

item.title: Industry Night
item.description:
Tuesday, June 30, 2026 at 9 PM

Location: The Mood Room Garden and Bar, 711 Milby Street, Houston, TX, 77023

Calling all restaurant & bar staff — 50% off all night just for you!Come through every Tuesday, 9 PM–2 AM, grab a drink, and vibe with the industry fam. You’ve earned it.

From The Mood Room

Event details
